summary: Live PR inventory shard with no shared canonical. Planned one conservative non-mutating classification per open PR; no close, merge, fix, or security-route actions are supported by the hydrated evidence and job permissions.

actions.reason: Unique formatting PR with live open state and mixed checks; keep independently for maintainer review rather than close or merge in this inventory shard.
Substantive feature/fix PR with active maintainer changes requested and failing proof; keep as an independent open PR for author/maintainer follow-up.
Broad agent prompt/runner PR with failing checks and unresolved review-bot context; keep independently rather than close as duplicate or low-signal.
Focused bug-fix PR with useful code but failing checks and unresolved bot-review context; keep independently for normal PR review rather than route security or close.
Draft docs-i18n fix with unique scope and maintainer-review state; keep independently rather than close or merge.
